name: small room
hints: A small room with a trampoline. You can take it with you.
GET TRAM to take the trampoline. It may be useful for reaching high places.
S leads to the shooting gallery. U leads to the knob room.
The trampoline is needed later to reach high places. Don't forget it!
notes: Contains the small trampoline - important item for reaching the top of the merry-go-round. S=shooting gallery (room 14), U=knob room (room 10).
